query:
INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, short_id, epic_id, title, description, design,
                                    issue_type, priority, owner, `status`, continuation_count, labels, acceptance_criteria, memory_refs)
                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'T', '', '', 'task', 0, '', 'open', 0, '[]', '[]', '[]')
